assignments.name: Subtract_Invoice_Qty_from_Fee_Qty
assignments.label: Subtract Invoice Qty from Fee Qty

Flow.description: ALN-26 - Created ALN-21 - Added Payroll Service Fee model ALN-175 - Cater for Daily and Weekly FFS Model ALN-21 - Changed FFS Weekly record type to support 1218 changes ALN-248 - Changed to support MPR for fee amount ALN-316 - Added logic to cater for MPR being found but no rate

formulas.name: ff_daily_CONTRACT_Invoice_Description
formulas.expression: {!Daily_Invoice_Description} & BR() & "Fee for Week Ending: " & TEXT(DAY({!ff_fee_date})) & "/" & TEXT(MONTH({!ff_fee_date})) & "/" & TEXT(YEAR({!ff_fee_date}))

formulas.name: ff_Weekly_CONTRACT_Invoice_Description
formulas.expression: "Payroll Service Fee" & BR() & "Candidate: " & {!Get_Placement.TR1__Person_Placed__r.FirstName} & " " & {!Get_Placement.TR1__Person_Placed__r.LastName} & BR() & "Job: " & {!Get_Placement.TR1__Job__r.Name} & BR() & "Fee for Week Ending: " & TEXT(DAY({!ff_fee_date})) & "/" & TEXT(MONTH({!ff_fee_date})) & "/" & TEXT(YEAR({!ff_fee_date}))

Flow.label: Create Invoiceable Fee

recordLookups.name: get_Minimum_Pay_Rate
recordLookups.label: get Minimum Pay Rate
recordLookups.filterLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND (5 OR 6) and 7

fields.name: instruction
fields.fieldText:
INSTRUCTIONS


At the conclusion of each week you will update the number of days worked with the days worked by the employee in the prior week. Then create the 'fee' which will create a fee for the Invoice Total amount (number of days worked X Daily Invoice Rate). Once created this fee will be invoiced.


This is to be repeated each week until the end of the assignment

fields.name: Daily_Invoice_Description
fields.helpText: Details entered will display on the clients Invoice. NOTE: For Daily Fees the Fee Date is added to the bottom of the invoice description so you do not need to add it

fields.name: Copy_2_of_dt_error
fields.fieldText:
ERROR


An MPR record was found however No Fee for Service Rate is set:


Job Role: {!Get_Placement.TR1__Job__r.s5m__JobRole__r.Name}

Award Classification: {!Get_Placement.TR1__Job__r.s5m__JobRole__r.tc9_ext_sirint__Award_Classification__r.Name}

Award Level of Candidate: {!var_candidate_award_level_name}

RC Template Group: {!Get_Placement.TR1__Job__r.s5m__JobRole__r.Rate_Template_Group__r.Name}

Fee Period: {!ff_placement_FFS_period}


MPR Record: {!get_Minimum_Pay_Rate.Name}


Please contact your administrator to ensure there is a valid Fee for Service Rate set on the MPR record

fields.name: Copy_2_of_txtCreated
fields.fieldText:
Success!


Your Invoiceable Fee has been successfully created for week ending: {!Contract_Fee_Date}

fields.name: Copy_1_of_dt_error
fields.fieldText:
ERROR


No award level available against the candidate (ticket/competency) based on the job role Award Classification:


Person Placed: {!Get_Placement.TR1__Person_Placed__r.FirstName} {!Get_Placement.TR1__Person_Placed__r.LastName}


Job Role Award Classification: {!Get_Placement.TR1__Job__r.s5m__JobRole__r.tc9_ext_sirint__Award_Classification__r.Name}


Please check candidate has valid Award Level competency based on the award classification and start date of the placement.

fields.name: dt_error
fields.fieldText:
ERROR


No Fee for Service Rate could be found based on the following details:


Job Role: {!Get_Placement.TR1__Job__r.s5m__JobRole__r.Name}

Award Classification: {!Get_Placement.TR1__Job__r.s5m__JobRole__r.tc9_ext_sirint__Award_Classification__r.Name}

Award Level of Candidate: {!var_candidate_award_level_name}

RC Template Group: {!Get_Placement.TR1__Job__r.s5m__JobRole__r.Rate_Template_Group__r.Name}

Fee Period: {!ff_placement_FFS_period}


Please contact your administrator to ensure there is a valid Fee for Service Rate

fields.name: txtCreated
fields.fieldText:
Success!

Your Invoiceable Fee has been successfully created.

fields.name: txtMissingDetails
fields.fieldText:
The related Client must have a 'Default Invoice Entity' and 'Invoice Contact' to create a Fee.

Please update the related Client and try again.

fields.name: dt_success
fields.fieldText:
SUCCESS


You have created the weekly contract fees for the date of this placement

fields.name: Warning_Message
fields.fieldText: Warning: A fee has already been created for this Placement.

fields.name: txtEmployee
fields.fieldText: Relating the Fee to an individual Employee is optional. If related to an Employee, the Employee's name will appear on the related Invoice.

fields.name: Invoice_Description
fields.helpText: Details entered will display on the clients Invoice.

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_txtBlank
fields.fieldText: This will create a total of {!Get_Placement.Number_of_Contract_Fees__c} weekly fees.

fields.name: warning
fields.fieldText:
WARNING


A total of {!Get_Placement.Number_of_Fees_Created__c} fees have already been created for this placement. Please review before proceeding

fields.name: Copy_1_of_Copy_1_of_Invoice_Description
fields.helpText: Details entered will display on the clients Invoice.
